name: Mawerick's House
description:
You are in a dark house, it's the house of Mawerick, it's a strange
place, you don't see any window here, the room is iluminated by a 
silver torch in the left corner, you see a big silver coffin in the
middle of the room, in the coffin you see a plaque writen: "To My son,
the Daywalker Vampire, from Locky, the EVIL.". The First Avenue is to
the South.
